source.update_note: 2026-27 migratory game bird data from Utah DWR waterfowl page. Utah waterfowl seasons follow USFWS frameworks approved in late summer. Northern and Southern Zones have split seasons for ducks and Canada geese. Sandhill crane hunting is limited quota — check the DWR guidebook for annual draw details.

species.name: Duck
species.season_raw: See zones below for split season dates

species.name: Canada Goose
species.season_raw: Same zone structure as ducks; see sub-seasons

species.name: Sandhill Crane
species.season_raw: Limited quota; check DWR guidebook for annual draw details
species.hunting_units: Limited quota hunting units per DWR guidebook

species.name: Crow
species.season_raw: Open season — no closed season in Utah

species.name: Youth Waterfowl
species.season_raw: Youth waterfowl days scheduled annually; check DWR guidebook

licenses.name: Resident 1-Year Basic Hunting (Ages 18-64)
licenses.covers: Basic hunting license for resident adults; valid one year

licenses.name: Resident Multi-Year Basic Hunting (Ages 18-64)
licenses.covers: Basic hunting license for resident adults at discounted annual rate

licenses.name: Resident 1-Year Combination License (Ages 18-64)
licenses.covers: Hunting + fishing combination license for resident adults

licenses.name: Resident Multi-Year Combination License (Ages 18-64)
licenses.covers: Hunting + fishing combination license at discounted annual rate

licenses.name: Nonresident 1-Year Basic Hunting (Ages 18+)
licenses.covers: Basic hunting license for nonresident adults; valid one year

licenses.name: Nonresident Multi-Year Basic Hunting (Ages 18+)
licenses.covers: Basic hunting license for nonresident adults at discounted annual rate

licenses.name: Nonresident 3-Day Small Game License
licenses.covers: Small game hunting for 3 consecutive days (nonresident)

licenses.name: Nonresident 1-Year Combination License
licenses.covers: Hunting + fishing combination license for nonresidents

licenses.name: Federal Duck Stamp
licenses.covers: Required for waterfowl hunters age 16+ (ducks, geese); electronic stamp valid for season

key_notes.title: A Federal Duck Stamp ($25) is required for all waterfowl hunters age 16 or older hunting ducks, geese, or other waterfowl in Utah.

sources.label: Utah DWR — Waterfowl Page
sources.evidence: Federal Duck Stamp ($25) required for waterfowl hunters 16+. Available at wildlife.utah.gov/licenses or any U.S. Post Office.

key_notes.title: HIP (Harvest Information Program) Certification is required for all migratory bird hunters in Utah.

sources.label: Utah DWR — Waterfowl Page
sources.evidence: HIP Certification is required for all migratory bird hunters. Available when purchasing a hunting license or at wildlife.utah.gov.

key_notes.title: Utah has two waterfowl zones — Northern and Southern — with split season segments for ducks and Canada geese. Northern Zone runs Oct 17–Dec 12 and Jan 8–30. Southern Zone runs Oct 24–Dec 14 and Jan 15–Mar 10.

sources.label: Utah DWR — Waterfowl Page
sources.evidence: Northern Zone: Segment 1 Oct 17–Dec 12, Segment 2 Jan 8–30; Southern Zone: Segment 1 Oct 24–Dec 14, Segment 2 Jan 15–Mar 10.

key_notes.title: Sandhill crane hunting is limited quota — hunters must apply through the Utah DWR permit drawing. Consult the annual DWR guidebook for application deadlines and unit-specific quotas.

sources.label: Utah DWR — Guidebooks
sources.evidence: Sandhill crane hunting is by limited quota only. See the Utah DWR guidebook for application details and unit-specific quotas.

key_notes.title: Youth waterfowl hunting days are scheduled annually by Utah DWR. Check the current DWR guidebook or waterfowl page for exact dates and regulations.

sources.label: Utah DWR — Waterfowl Page
sources.evidence: Youth waterfowl days are held each year. Consult the DWR guidebook or waterfowl page for current season dates.

key_notes.title: Crows have no closed season in Utah — hunting is permitted year-round with no daily bag or possession limit.

sources.label: Utah DWR — Waterfowl Page
sources.evidence: Crow season is open; no daily limit or possession limit imposed.
